LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR ISSUANCE OF ORDER FOR CREATION OF LIEN ON RIGHTS UNDER A PENDING ACTION PURSUANT TO CCP 491.415(B)- MR. COOK IS DIRECTED TO ATTEND THE STATUS CONFERENCE TO BE HELD BEFORE BANKRUPTCY JUDGE MONTALI ON JANUARY 13 TO RAISE THE ISSUE DIRECTLY WHETHER WHAT IS SOUGHT BY PLAINTIFF IS IN VIOLATION OF THE AUTOMATIC STAY. IF THE SALE WOULD PROCEED ON 1/17/17, ANY AMOUNTS IN EXCESS OVER THE CLAIM OF THE DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATION'S LIEN AND THE BANK SHALL BE HELD BY THE SHERIFF DEPARTMENT PENDING RESOLUTION OF THIS MOTION. PARTIES CAN GO TO THE EX-PARTE CALENDAR ON JANUARY 18, 2017 AT 11 A.M. TO SET UP A BRIEFING AND HEARING SCHEDULE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SIEW UNG, CSR #13994, TEL. Hearing On Plaintiff'S Application For Issuance Of Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment For Interest In Real Property In The Hands Of A Fraudulent Conveyee Pursuant To Civ C 3439.07(A)(2)&(B) And Ccp 488.475 And Ccp 488.480 Et Seq
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID COOK, TEL. NO. 1-415-989-4730 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. IRENE Y. FUJII OF THE FINKELSTEIN BENDER & FUJIII LLP, TEL. NO. 1-650-353-4503 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS FAY TONG & LON KINCANNON;
ATTY. EVAN R. ADAMS & ATTY. ED KUNNES, DEPT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS, TEL. NO. 1-510-286-3800, INTERESTED PARTY.
SIEW UNG, TEL. NO. 1-415-260-2261, COURT REPORTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. Plaintiff'S Application For Issuance Of Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment For Interest In Real Property In The Hands Of A Fraudulent Conveyee Pursuant To Civ C 3439.07(A)(2)&(B) And Ccp 488.475 And Ccp 488.480 Et Seq - Mr. Cook is directed to attend the Status Conference to be held before Bankruptcy Judge Montali on January 13 to raise the issue directly whether what is sought by plaintiff is in violation of the automatic stay. If the sale would proceed on 1/17/17, any amounts in excess over the claim of the Department of Industrial Relation's lien and the bank shall be held by the sheriff department pending resolution of this motion. Parties can go to the ex-parte calendar on January 18, 2017 at 11 a.m. to set up a briefing and hearing schedule. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Siew Ung, CSR #13994, TEL. NO. 1-415-260-2261.

RULING - Plaintiff'S Application For Issuance Of Order For Creation Of Lien On Rights Under A Pending Action Pursuant To Ccp 491.415(B)- Mr. Cook is directed to attend the Status Conference to be held before Bankruptcy Judge Montali on January 13 to raise the issue directly whether what is sought by plaintiff is in violation of the automatic stay. If the sale would proceed on 1/17/17, any amounts in excess over the claim of the Department of Industrial Relation's lien and the bank shall be held by the sheriff department pending resolution of this motion. Parties can go to the ex-parte calendar on January 18, 2017 at 11 a.m. to set up a briefing and hearing schedule. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Siew Ung, CSR #13994, TEL. NO. 1-415-260-2261. =302/hk
